description: Product Description Veryhome 一 A lifestyle brand that seeks to create and promote a wide range of lifestyle products, to help many people enjoy a multitude of different activities. Ve ryhome c reates innovative products that are acceptable, but still offer a good level of functionality and performance. Ve ryhome's p roduct is about fitting into a fluid and exciting lifestyle and helping to maintain that flow. The meaning of roses——Flower of Love，Eternal Love！ A bunch of roses is better than a thousand kisses. The sweet smile of the girl comes from a bouquet of roses. Love me, take me away! Give her roses, she will give her heart to you. Eternal love, the rose witnesses the eternal love. The flowers are held in the hands, sweet in our hearts. Special gift, for special you! In ancient Greek mythology, the rose is a combination of love and beauty. It is both the embodiment of the god and the blood of the god of love. Around the world, roses are the universal language used to express love. Wedding /Party Decoration Renderings Rose wedding Scene Wedding is an important place to use the roses, roses will make the wedding dinner more romantic.What a romantic scene! Roses represent romance, roses decorate the romantic atmosphere! Loyal to love, loyal to romance! Fresh and romantic interior! Easily cut, bend or straighten stems for all sorts of arrangements, make your home,party and wedding become beautiful and atmosphere Support DIY You can use it to make a different beautiful pattern,DIY door wreath,christmas,home,party or wedding decor etc. These silk roses is perfect for DIY with other flowers, such as hydrangeas, babys breath, peony, and mixed into bouquets, floral crowns, flower arrangements and photography props.
